reviews.review_description: There's no option that I found for lowering the music it's too loud, I'm in the seated position there's no way to actually adjust it. And the voice acting or rather I assume AI voice over is atrocious. While it may be a good idea badly executed.

I love it. It has the most amazing graphics and music. The stories are way too intense and you want to play it more. Every story is different and unique. I have played other apps too but I think this one is the best among them because of its graphics. :)
I like the graphics. Nice efforts
I absolutely love this app it's one of my favourite and the interactive stories are amazing! I'm so into them that I can't stop reading my favourite ones here

really cheesy storyline,but very fun game.I love that you can choose to watch ads to get more energy and stuff. You can pay but you really don’t have to. I can play for hours if I want to, only if I watch ads for extra energy.
why is that man in riding a skateboard in the grocery store?

developer_response.body: Hi! byteframe, Thanks for checking out the game. Actually, it’s not a small grocery shop — it’s a big indoor market designed to fit the story and scene of that mission. The skateboard part adds a fun twist to the gameplay and narrative. Hope you got a chance to play further and see how the story unfolds!

reviews.review_title: Still Has a Ways to Go
reviews.review_description: I wanted to give 3.5 stars for now.  This app has a ton of potential but definitely needs a lot more development. I thought the imagery is pretty good I would like to be able to move around and explore the campus more though. Romance novels are extremely popular and a huge industry including YA books.  I was looking forward to some type of clean immersive experience in the genre. However the characters behave very immature so I was confused whether it is college or high school. The dialog is quite flat, it needs more character and storyline and plot development. I realize of course that the app is not complete yet. Having the options of either audio or reading would probably be better.  If done right this could be a great app and make a lot of money.

developer_response.body:
Hi spacetrvlr2024,
Thank you so much for your detailed feedback — it really helps us improve. We’re glad you enjoyed the visuals and completely agree that deeper character development and a more interactive world would make the story stronger. We’re actively working on expanding exploration, refining dialogues, and adding new audio options in upcoming updates. Your suggestions are spot on, and we hope you’ll check back soon to see the progress!

Hello! Laughing_Duck,
Hi! We’re sorry to hear you didn’t enjoy the game. It’s still improving with every update — we’re focused on adding better visuals and smoother mechanics. Your feedback helps us grow, and we’d love for you to check out the latest version once it’s live!
